name: DevSwap
description: DevSwap is a non-custodial peer-to-peer smart-contract escrow on BNB Smart Chain for Solidity and Web3 development services. Settlement currency is USDT; the protocol applies a fixed 1.5% fee and an independent 1.5% buyback-burn that permanently reduces DSWP supply on every milestone release. ERC20Capped at 100,000,000 maximum; no staking, no yield, no inflation.
